title: Rope 17
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Rope 17''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy sent to the [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility]] [[ZA-13]] following its recapture by the Empire from forces loyal to the renegade [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]]. The station was being upgraded from manufacturing [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrives]] to allow for full production of the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] and Rope 17 carried the final equipment to allow the assembly lines to begin operation.

The convoy consisted of:

*(2x) [[Cargo ferry|Cargo ferries]] [[Terry (transports)|''Terry'']] carrying Foodstuffs
*[[Container transport]] ''[[Contel]]'' carrying medical supplies
*[[Modular conveyor]] ''[[Vendor]]'' carrying equipment
*(2x) [[Modular conveyor]]s ''[[Dromii]]'' carrying equipment.

As the convoy approached ZA-13 it came under attack from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] but the Rebels were defeated by Imperial forces and the convoy was able to deliver its cargo and make it into hyperspace.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter: Defender of the Empire]]''
